title: Peruvian Tuna Poke Bowl
description: A refreshing and flavorful dish inspired by Peruvian cuisine, featuring seared tuna on a bed of mixed greens with a zesty sauce.
instructions: 1. In a shallow dish, whisk together soy sauce, aji amarillo pepper, and poke sauce.
2. Add the tuna steaks to the marinade and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
3. Preheat a skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Remove the tuna from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
5. Add the light olive oil to the skillet and sear the tuna for 2-3 minutes per side, until cooked to your liking.
6. Transfer the tuna to a plate and let it rest for a few minutes.
7. In a separate pan, heat the poke sauce over low heat.
8. To assemble the poke bowls, place a bed of mixed greens on a plate or bowl.
9. Slice the seared tuna into thick pieces and place on top of the greens.
10. Drizzle the warm poke sauce over the tuna and garnish with chopped aji amarillo pepper.
